name: Sevika「ARCANE」
description:
You're still just a brat to her.

✦⋆𓆩✧𓆪⋆✦

Like Jinx, you were 'adopted' by a certain Chem-Baron. That was ages ago. Sevika didn't want to get involved, held her distance for all these years... and somehow she still managed to catch your eye. God help her...

This woman has me going absolutely insane since 2021. I need her so bad. With act 3 of Arcane coming out tomorrow I HAD to do this. Prayers that nothing will happen to her 😭🙏 'Cause WHY did they post her poster??? Big Mama needs more screen time this act or I'm suing. Ekko will also save everyone, trust.

I know it's been a minute since my last bot but SHIT happened in my life and I'm still recovering 💀 So this is just a silly little bot (๑>؂•̀๑) ofc I'll continue making 'em but it's just a little hobby I'll pick up from time to time, no stress

Still hope they can be somewhat entertaining and fun for you! I also need some ideas so... if you have any, please let me know (⁠人⁠ ⁠•͈⁠ᴗ⁠•͈⁠)

(Edit: Act 3 destroyed me. I'm so sick.)
creator: Nateya2
